name: Student Return — Tax on Split Income (TOSI) Private Dividend
description: Complete Chloe Tremblay's 2024 Canadian personal income tax return using StudioTax 2024. Use the tax documents detailed in 'C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\TaxDocuments\tremblay\scenario_tremblay_tosi.txt', including her T4 employment income ($8,500), T4A scholarship ($5,000), T2202 tuition certificate (8 months full-time), and T5 dividend ($25,000 in Box 10). The dividend is subject to Tax on Split Income (TOSI) and Form T1206 because she does not work in the family business. Save the completed return as 'chloe_tremblay.24t' in 'C:\Users\Docker\Documents\StudioTax\'.

metadata.data_source: CRA T5 Slip Format 2024 and CRA Form T1206 (Tax on Split Income)
metadata.key_complexity: Tax on Split Income (TOSI) requires explicitly flagging the T5 dividend so it flows to Form T1206 and is taxed at the highest marginal rate. Also tests full-time student scholarship exemption.
